news.t: UPDATE -- Tidal Financial Group and Defiance ETFs Announce Reverse Stock Splits for Select ETFs
Tidal Financial Group and Defiance ETFs Announce Reverse Stock Splits for Select ETFs
Defiance ETFs Announces First Weekly Distribution of $0.3350/Share for $MST: Defiance Leveraged Long + Income MSTR ETF
Defiance ETFs Unveils $MST: The First Leveraged MicroStrategy ETF that Seeks to Pay Income Weekly

holdings.infoBox: MST is an equity ETF with a total of 17 individual holdings. The top holdings are STRATEGY INC SWAP CS stock at 53.25%, STRATEGY INC SWAP MAREX at 51.74%, STRATEGY INC SWAP CANTOR at 50.99%, US DOLLARS at 48.63%, and MSTR US 06/12/26 C85 at 27.22%.

overview.description: The Defiance Leveraged Long Income MSTR ETF (MST) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that provides 1.5x to 2x leveraged exposure to the daily share price movement of the MicroStrategy Incorporated (NYSE: MSTR), less fees and expenses. The fund uses credit call spreads to generate income MST was launched on May 1, 2025 and is issued by Defiance.
